title: dryopsis paucisora
intro: Dryopsis paucisora is a species of fern native to the southeastern United States, particularly in the mountainous regions of North Carolina and Georgia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The fern is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists recommending it for its potential to reduce fever and alleviate cold symptoms.
